findings.issue: reviewers = [dev-code-reviewer, dev-test-reviewer] for a code-writing task; the catalog default set for code-writing also includes dev-security-auditor. Frontmatter and the Reviewers section are internally consistent, and this matches the tech-spec's per-task reviewer list, so the omission originates upstream in the tech-spec, not in decomposition.
findings.fix: If a security pass is desired, add dev-security-auditor (and update the tech-spec Task 1 reviewer list to match). Acceptable to leave as-is for a pure query/selector+test task with no untrusted input.

findings.issue: reviewers = [dev-code-reviewer] only; catalog default for code-writing is [dev-code-reviewer, dev-security-auditor, dev-test-reviewer]. Internally consistent and matches tech-spec Task 2; deviation is intentional/upstream (view-wiring change with TestNew guard test covered).
findings.fix: Optionally add dev-test-reviewer given the new TestNew_ReplslotsView test. Not blocking.

findings.issue: reviewers = [dev-deploy-reviewer, dev-code-reviewer]; catalog default for deploy-pipeline is [dev-code-reviewer, dev-security-auditor, dev-deploy-reviewer]. dev-security-auditor omitted. Internally consistent and matches tech-spec Task 4.
findings.fix: Optionally add dev-security-auditor (touches Dockerfile / CI workflow tags). Low risk; not blocking.

findings.issue: Project-knowledge link labeled [project.md] but points to .claude/skills/project-knowledge/overview.md — label/target mismatch (the inline note acknowledges the file is overview.md). Other tasks label it [overview.md] consistently.
findings.fix: Relabel the link to [overview.md] to match the actual target and the other task files.

findings.issue: Feature-artifact and code links use repo-root-relative paths (e.g. docs/features/005-.../005-feat-replication-slots.md, internal/query/...). The task file lives inside docs/features/005-feat-replication-slots/, so feature-artifact links should be bare filenames (as in tasks 01-04). Reviewer/decisions paths are written full (docs/features/...) instead of the bare-filename style used in tasks 01-04. Functional inconsistency, not a correctness break.
findings.fix: Normalize links to the same relative style as tasks 01-04: bare filenames for feature artifacts/decisions/review JSON, and a consistent relative prefix for code files.

findings.issue: Code-file links use ../../../ relative prefixes while task 03 uses absolute /home/... paths and task 05 uses repo-root-relative paths. Cross-task link style is inconsistent across the batch (cosmetic).
findings.fix: Pick one link convention for code files across all five tasks (relative-to-task-file is preferred).
